caption: A man with a tall, silver, textured hairstyle and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white shirt, brown suspenders, and a red bowtie. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall adorned with framed photographs and clothing racks. In each frame, a logo appearing as a white microphone icon accompanied by the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" is visible on the left and right sides of the image. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a similar posture with his arms crossed, but his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. The lighting and camera angle remain consistent throughout the clip, capturing him from the chest up in a medium shot.
